conj.statement: 70% of districts are rural/remote; 40% of students are Alaska Native (DOE, 2023); federal funding gaps due to unique land status. 2. **Hawaii**: State-run school system (only 2 counties); 55% students of color; unique Pacific Islander cultural/linguistic needs (HIDOE, 2024). 3. **Montana**: 11 tribal nations; 75% of reservations lack broadband; funding tied to tribal sovereignty (MT OPI, 2023). 4. **Wyoming**: 30% of districts are single-school; population density 6.1/sq mi; teacher shortages in STEM (WY DOE, 2024). 5. **Vermont**: 90% rural; aging population; 22% of districts below 100 studen
contradicting_evidence: Housing Instability**: 1 in 4 LAUSD students experience homelessness (CA Homelessness Dashboard, 2024).
Cultural Mismatch**: 75% of teachers are non-Hispanic white, while 78% of students are Latinx or Black (CA DESE, 2024).
Charter Competition**: 35% of LAUSD students attend charters, draining $1.2B annually from traditional districts (LAUSD Fiscal Analysis, 2023).
